code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for t in toks
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  let na = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < na
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(sorted, x)
        sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let m = sorted.len()
  if m == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    while j < m
      match sorted.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(out)
  end
end
